title: neotchihatchewia isatidea
intro: Neotchihatchewia isatidea, also known as Indian tobacco, is a plant species native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The leaves of Neotchihatchewia isatidea have been used in herbal preparations to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, and also to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and smoked, or made into a tea or infusion to take advantage of its health benefits.
